info.title: Charity API
info.description: The Charity API allows third-party developers to search for and access details on supported charitable organizations.

get.description: This call is used to retrieve detailed information about supported charitable organizations. It allows users to retrieve the details for a specific charitable organization using its charity organization ID.

parameters.name: charity_org_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the charitable organization.

parameters.name: X-EBAY-C-MARKETPLACE-ID
parameters.description:
A header used to specify the eBay marketplace ID.

Valid Values: EBAY_GB and EBAY_US

165001.description: Invalid, missing or unsupported marketplace. Please refer to documentation.

165000.description: There was a problem with an eBay internal system or process. Contact eBay developer support for assistance.

165002.description: Charity Org Id is invalid or missing.

get.description:
This call is used to search for supported charitable organizations. It allows users to search for a specific charitable organization, or for multiple charitable organizations, from a particular charitable domain and/or geographical region, or by using search criteria.

The call returns paginated search results containing the charitable organizations that match the specified criteria.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
The number of items, from the result set, returned in a single page.

Valid Values: 1-100

Default: 20

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description:
The number of items that will be skipped in the result set. This is used with the limit field to control the pagination of the output.

For example, if the offset is set to 0 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 1 through 10 from the list of items returned. If the offset is set to 10 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 11 through 20 from the list of items returned.

Valid Values: 0-10,000

Default: 0

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A query string that matches the keywords in name, mission statement, or description.

parameters.name: registration_ids
parameters.description:
A comma-separated list of charitable organization registration IDs.

Note: Do not specify this parameter for query-based searches. Specify either the q or registration_ids parameter, but not both.

Maximum Limit: 20

parameters.name: X-EBAY-C-MARKETPLACE-ID
parameters.description:
A header used to specify the eBay marketplace ID.

Valid Values: EBAY_GB and EBAY_US

165003.description: The specified limit is invalid. Maximum value supported is 100.

165001.description: Invalid, missing or unsupported marketplace. Please refer to documentation.

165005.description: Please specify registration_ids OR query text for the search.

165000.description: There was a problem with an eBay internal system or process. Contact eBay developer support for assistance.

city.description: The city of the charitable organization.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province of the charitable organization.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the charitable organization.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country of the address.

Address.description: The physical location of the item.

charityOrgId.description: The ID of the charitable organization.

description.description: The description of the charitable organization.

location.description: The location details of the charitable organization.

logoImage.description: The logo of the charitable organization.

missionStatement.description: The mission statement of the charitable organization.

name.description: The name of the charitable organization.

registrationId.description:
The registration ID for the charitable organization.

Note: For the US marketplace, this is the EIN.

website.description: The link to the website for the charitable organization.

CharityOrg.description: The full location, ID, logo and other details of the charity organization.

charityOrgs.description: The list of charitable organizations that match the search criteria.

href.description: The relative path to the current set of results.

limit.description:
The number of items, from the result set, returned in a single page.

Valid Values: 1-100

Default: 20

next.description: The relative path to the next set of results.

offset.description:
The number of items that will be skipped in the result set. This is used with the limit field to control the pagination of the output.

For example, if the offset is set to 0 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 1 through 10 from the list of items returned. If the offset is set to 10 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 11 through 20 from the list of items returned.

Valid Values: 0-10,000

Default: 0

prev.description: The relative path to the previous set of results.

total.description: The total number of matches for the search criteria.

CharitySearchResponse.description: A single set of search results, with information for accessing other sets.

domain.description: Name for the primary system where the error occurred. This is relevant for application errors.

errorId.description: A unique number to identify the error.

inputRefIds.description: An array of request elements most closely associated to the error.

longMessage.description: A more detailed explanation of the error.

message.description: Information on how to correct the problem, in the end user's terms and language where applicable.

outputRefIds.description: An array of request elements most closely associated to the error.

parameters.description: An array of name/value pairs that describe details the error condition. These are useful when multiple errors are returned.

subdomain.description: Further helps indicate which subsystem the error is coming from. System subcategories include: Initialization, Serialization, Security, Monitoring, Rate Limiting, etc.

Error.description: This type defines the fields that can be returned in an error.

latitude.description: The latitude component of the geographic coordinate.

longitude.description: The longitude component of the geographic coordinate.

GeoCoordinates.description: Defines the format of a geographic coordinate.

height.description: The height of the logo image.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the logo image location.

width.description: The width of the logo image.

Image.description: The logo of the charitable organization.

address.description: The address of the charitable organization.

geoCoordinates.description: The geo-coordinates of the charitable organization.

api_auth.description: The security definitions for this API. Please check individual operations for applicable scopes.
